decomposition_rule.description: 万户级负责任务总览与协调；千户级负责技术方案制定与评估；百户级负责具体执行工具与数据准备；十户级负责图片内容分析、价格识别与结果上报。

reporting_cycle.content: 各级任务进度、遇到的问题、已完成的阶段性成果及对总目标的贡献。十户级在识别到价格信息后，需立即上报初步结果。

agent_trace.summary: [执行中] 已将万户任务 '从图片判断小米SU7价格' 分解为10个千户子任务。

mingghan_allocations.title: Image Pre-processing & Feature Extraction
mingghan_allocations.description: Pre-process the provided image for analysis and extract general visual features relevant to vehicle identification and pricing.

mingghan_allocations.title: Vehicle Model & Trim Identification
mingghan_allocations.description: Identify the specific Xiaomi SU7 model, trim level, and manufacturing year from visual cues present in the image.

mingghan_allocations.title: Exterior Feature Recognition
mingghan_allocations.description: Recognize and list all visible exterior features (e.g., wheel type, paint color, specific body kits, accessories) that might influence the vehicle's market price.

mingghan_allocations.title: Interior Feature Recognition (if visible)
mingghan_allocations.description: If the vehicle's interior is sufficiently visible in the image, identify key interior features (e.g., screen configuration, seat materials, special trims) that impact pricing.

mingghan_allocations.title: Market Price Research - Base Models
mingghan_allocations.description: Conduct comprehensive market research to gather the base prices for all known Xiaomi SU7 variants and their standard configurations across relevant markets.

mingghan_allocations.title: Market Price Research - Optional Packages & Upgrades
mingghan_allocations.description: Research and compile detailed pricing information for common optional packages, factory upgrades, and dealer-installed accessories available for the Xiaomi SU7.

mingghan_allocations.title: Regional & Promotional Price Adjustment Research
mingghan_allocations.description: Investigate potential regional pricing differences, local government incentives, current promotional offers, or special editions that could affect the final price.

mingghan_allocations.title: Data Synthesis & Initial Price Range Calculation
mingghan_allocations.description: Synthesize all identified image-derived features with gathered market data to calculate an initial estimated price or a reasonable price range for the specific vehicle.

mingghan_allocations.title: Uncertainty & Confidence Assessment
mingghan_allocations.description: Analyze and document factors contributing to uncertainty in the price estimation (e.g., image quality limitations, hidden features, market volatility) and assess the confidence level of the estimate.

mingghan_allocations.title: Final Price Determination & Justification
mingghan_allocations.description: Formulate the final most probable price or price range for the Xiaomi SU7, providing a clear and concise justification based on all compiled information and analysis.

risks: Critical: The actual image input for task 'T51zh_su7_price_from_image-01' is not provided in the current task context. This is a fundamental requirement for image analysis subtasks and will block execution at the Mingghan-level and below. Downstream stages will need to handle this missing input.

agent_trace.summary: [已完成] 千户级任务分解已完成，已成功传递给百户级。

jaghun_allocations.title: 图像识别与解析：识别图片中的车辆品牌、型号、年份等关键信息。
价格信息提取：从图片中直接识别价格标签、广告语等。
车辆特征分析：分析车辆配置、颜色、内饰等特征，作为价格判断依据。
市场价格查询（基础版）：基于识别出的车辆信息，进行初步的市场价格范围查询。
同款车型对比：查找类似配置和年份的小米SU7车型，进行价格对比。
二手车市场调研：考虑车辆新旧程度，进行二手车市场价格调研。
地区差异分析：考虑不同地区的价格差异（如果图片有地域信息）。
促销与优惠信息：识别图片中可能存在的促销、优惠信息。
不确定性评估：评估价格判断的不确定性来源（如图片模糊、信息不全）。
价格区间汇总与报告：汇总所有信息，给出最终价格区间或精确价格。
